articles.title: LIVE: Middle East tensions remain high as war fears persist
articles.description: Global attention remains focused on the Middle East as military tensions continue to threaten international shipping routes and global oil stability.

articles.title: LIVE: French municipal elections move toward decisive second round
articles.description: France prepares for the second round of municipal elections as political alliances intensify across major cities following a highly competitive first round.

articles.title: Ukraine warns global focus shifting away from ongoing war
articles.description: Ukrainian officials express concern that international attention is shifting toward the Middle East, potentially affecting support in its ongoing conflict.

articles.title: Oil markets remain volatile amid global uncertainty
articles.description: Energy markets continue to react to geopolitical tensions with fluctuating oil prices raising concerns for global inflation.

articles.title: Air travel disruptions continue across key global routes
articles.description: Airlines are adjusting routes and schedules due to ongoing geopolitical tensions, leading to delays and higher ticket prices.

articles.title: Security concerns rise across Nigeria amid multiple incidents
articles.description: Authorities across Nigeria continue to respond to incidents including road accidents, crime cases and security threats in several states.

articles.title: Boko Haram and ISWAP shift focus to military infrastructure
articles.description: Security experts warn that extremist groups are increasingly targeting military bases to weaken defense systems and gain access to weapons.

articles.title: PalmPay expands digital payment services nationwide
articles.description: Fintech company PalmPay continues expansion across Nigeria to improve access to digital financial services.

articles.title: Scientists raise concerns over climate and environmental risks
articles.description: New research highlights growing environmental threats including wildlife loss and climate-related disruptions.

articles.title: Healthcare experts warn about impact of poor sleep
articles.description: Medical experts say lack of proper sleep can lead to long-term health complications including stress and heart-related conditions.

articles.title: Global entertainment industry sees shift in digital trends
articles.description: Entertainment platforms are adapting to new audience behaviors driven by social media and digital content consumption.

articles.title: Sports events continue to face disruption from global tensions
articles.description: Major sporting events remain affected by security concerns, forcing cancellations and schedule changes.
